name: Promo Quoter
description: Modernised legacy quoting software for promotional products, achieving a 10x performance improvement and reducing errors from daily to monthly.

projects.name: Promo Quoter
projects.description: Modernised a legacy CodeIgniter 4 application to Symfony, integrating Stripe billing, customer portal, and subscriptions. Restructured the database with indexing and query profiling for a ~10x performance improvement, and migrated blocking workloads like email to background workers. Reduced error rate from daily occurrences to approximately once monthly.
